response.overview: A promotional video made to promote the infamous Las Vegas strip club that closed in the 2000s. Thrill to the bevy of beauties in a private strip tease just for you, as well as interviews with them during a wet & wild excursion to the beach for a sun tanning session. Boats, jet-skis, sun and fun all abound in this full hour of fun.
response.title: Girls of Crazy Horse too
